description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden table with a light, natural finish and a smooth, plank-textured surface. The tabletop features a distinctive cut-out section, creating an offset rectangular profile. The table is supported by three sturdy, rectangular wooden legs, with one leg positioned at the inner corner of the L-shape for added stability. The underside of the table is plain, with no visible drawers or storage compartments. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a warm, organic appearance. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for communal or workspace use in urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped wooden table with a light natural finish, visible wood grain, and three sturdy rectangular legs. The tabletop has a distinctive cut-out section and a smooth, plank-textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shape, the cut-out section on the right, and two visible legs supporting the table.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the extended tabletop and the cut-out section on the left, with one leg visible.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the table, the L-shaped cut-out, and two legs aligned vertically.
description_view_3: Top-down view clearly displaying the L-shaped tabletop, the cut-out, and the arrangement of all three legs.
